hints.description: This company specializes in accelerating and securing online experiences for businesses and end-users globally. They provide a range of services including content delivery network (CDN), edge computing, security solutions, and media delivery, ensuring fast and reliable access to digital content. Founded by Tom Leighton and Daniel Lewin, it’s notable for its significant role in optimizing internet performance and protecting against cyber threats.
hints.funFact1: Initially, the company's core technology was developed at MIT as a research project focused on improving the performance of online games, specifically to reduce lag for players.
hints.funFact2: Daniel Lewin, one of the co-founders, tragically passed away in 2001 during the 9/11 attacks; he was a former Israeli Intelligence Corps officer.
